dictionary_candidates.title: 词库候选：God of War Laufey → 战神：Laufey
dictionary_candidates.rule: Observe the title rendering for God of War Laufey; do not add it to the dictionary without entity confirmation.
dictionary_candidates.semantic_rationale: The polished title is a single-article rendering and conflicts with the established Chinese name for Laufey. Keep it as an observation until a source-context match resolves whether this is a distinct title or an inconsistent rendering.
dictionary_candidates.misuse_risk: Could create an incorrect dictionary entry for a title or character reference.

examples.evidence: 来自文章页未确认新词候选。

dictionary_candidates.title: 词库候选：Ryse: Son of Rome → Ryse：罗马之子
dictionary_candidates.rule: Observe Ryse: Son of Rome → 崛起：罗马之子 pending corroborating user-polished examples or explicit feedback.
dictionary_candidates.semantic_rationale: The user consistently changed this article to 崛起：罗马之子, but the candidate pair itself is only supported by one article on one day. Retain it for future corroboration rather than promoting it to the dictionary.
dictionary_candidates.misuse_risk: A single article-level normalization may not establish the intended canonical game title.

examples.evidence: 来自文章页未确认新词候选。

archived_changes.title: 媒体来源名可用书名号标识
archived_changes.rule: 正文引用媒体、网站或行业出版物作为消息来源时，可用书名号标识来源名，并保留英文原名。
archived_changes.semantic_rationale: 6/16 的润色将 The Game Business 等来源名改为带书名号的来源写法。

examples.before: The Game Business今天率先报道了离职消息。两人共同离职的原因并未给出，不过这一事件发生之际，正值外界对Xbox Game Studios及其众多员工未来深感担忧——此前新上任的Xbox负责人Asha Sharma对该部门微薄的利润率发出了严厉警告。
examples.after: 《The Game Business》今天率先报道了离职消息。两人共同离职的原因并未给出，不过这一事件发生之际，正值外界对Xbox Game Studios及其众多员工未来深感担忧——此前新上任的Xbox负责人Asha Sharma对该部门微薄的利润率发出了严厉警告。

examples.before: 今天早些时候，The Game Business报道Xbox Game Studios负责人Craig Duncan已离职，随后Kotaku报道《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion面临关闭威胁。现在彭博社又称，几乎所有微软旗下工作室都忧心于下一步走向，其中Ninja Theory和Double Fine被点名正与母公司协商。
examples.after: 今天稍早，《The Game Business》报道称Xbox Game Studios负责人Craig Duncan已经离职，随后Kotaku又报道《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion面临关闭风险。如今，彭博社进一步指出，几乎所有微软旗下游戏工作室都在担忧自己的未来，而Ninja Theory和Double Fine则已被点名正在与母公司进行谈判。
